title: Heating Simulation - Smart Sensor System
description: Real-time Smart Heating controller metrics from heating_system_smart_final.py
__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__: 1. Import this file into Grafana: Dashboards → Import → Upload JSON
2. After import: open each panel → Edit → Data Source dropdown → select your InfluxDB
3. OR: find+replace '"uid": "influxdb-uid"' with your real UID
4. Your InfluxDB datasource UID is shown in: Grafana → Configuration → Data Sources → InfluxDB → URL bar
5. Bucket must exist: spring_data  |  Measurement: spring_heating  |  Org: spring_factory

panels.title: Sensor Temp vs Auto Target
panels.description: Live process temperature from thermocouple vs auto-computed PID setpoint

targets.query:
from(bucket: "spring_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spring_heating")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sensor_temp" or r._field == "target")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Heater Power (%)
panels.description: PID output — heater power. Drops to 0% immediately on sensor FAULT.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "spring_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spring_heating" and r._field == "power")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Ambient Temp & Humidity
panels.description: Environmental sensor readings used by the Auto Target Setter

targets.query:
from(bucket: "spring_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spring_heating")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ambient" or r._field == "humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "spring_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spring_heating" and r._field == "error")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "spring_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spring_heating" and r._field == "system_fault")
  |> last()

panels.title: Total Alarms
panels.description: Cumulative count of SENSOR FAULT alarms raised since startup

targets.query:
from(bucket: "spring_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spring_heating" and r._field == "alarm_count")
  |> last()

panels.title: PID Terms (P / I / D)
panels.description: P=instant reaction  I=accumulated error  D=rate of change (braking)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "spring_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spring_heating")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "p_term" or r._field == "i_term" or r._field == "d_term")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Machine State
panels.description: Current operating state: HEATING / STABLE / COOLING / SENSOR FAULT

targets.query:
from(bucket: "spring_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spring_heating" and r._field == "state")
  |> last()

panels.title: Sensor Modes (REAL / SIMULATION / FAULT)
panels.description: Shows live data source for each sensor — REAL=hardware, SIMULATION=physics model, FAULT=alarm

targets.query:
from(bucket: "spring_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spring_heating")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temp_mode" or r._field == "hum_mode" or r._field == "amb_mode")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "temp_mode", "hum_mode", "amb_mode"])
